title: Senior Teacher - Teach For India Ventures Solutions - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Teach For India Ventures Solutions - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the Teach For India Ventures Solutions family as a Senior Teacher in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Teach For India Ventures Solutions:
Teach For India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Teach For India Ventures Solutions!
